backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the VTH guestbook backend with user profile management, guestbook entry CRUD operations, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that AddEntryPage was updated to allow unauthenticated form submission, removing any sign-in gate or disabled state blocking anonymous users.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including colors for backgrounds, cards, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the VTH Guest Book app, loading Leaflet CSS and JS via CDN and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for the feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages under a shared AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component that explains the VTH Guest Book project and defines what a Vicarious Thru-Hiker is.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component providing the sticky header with VTH branding and Login/Logout button, a main content outlet, a footer with an About dialog trigger, and a bottom navigation bar.
A dialog component for editing an existing guestbook entry, managing form state for name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place with geocoding support via PlaceSearchField.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small informational card component that displays a legend hint telling users to tap a pin to view entry details.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A styled SVG map pin button component that visually highlights when selected and supports click interactions.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A form field component that lets users search for places via the geocoding API, displaying results in a dropdown for selection and auto-selecting if only one result is returned.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting guestbook entries via the ICP backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines warm earthy OKLCH color tokens for light and dark modes, and adds touch-friendly sizing and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: A utility module that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API to search for places by name and returns normalized geocoding results with coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Utility functions for formatting guestbook entry data, including author labels, timestamps, coordinates, and encoding/decoding place names embedded in comment strings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Form page for creating a new guestbook entry with optional current location (via GPS or search) and favorite AT place, encoding place names into the comment before submission.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Renders a Leaflet map showing pins for guestbook entries that have a favorite Appalachian Trail place, with popups displaying author name and place name.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Detail view for a single guestbook entry showing full content, location badges, and edit/delete controls restricted to the entry's creator.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Displays a chronologically sorted list of all guestbook entries as clickable cards with author, timestamp, comment preview, and location badges.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Renders a Leaflet world map with pins for guestbook entries that have a current location, showing author, place name, and comment preview in popups.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and Inter font family.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a guestbook app on the Internet Computer, tracking the in-progress work to remove mandatory Internet Identity authentication so anyone can submit entries anonymously.
